Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Dipping sonars effectively place a miniaturized variable depth sonar on a long cable in the helicopter's cabin, which can be lowered down while the helicopter hovers above the water.
Dipping sonars can be placed below the layer, and usually include an active sonar as well as a passive receiver, so are very useful when searching an area for a submerged contact.
You can order the helicopter to dip its sonar using the EMCON menu at bottom right, and can set the depth (either above/below layer) using this same menu.
